# SmartSwing AI — LLM & AI Search Reference

> SmartSwing AI is an AI-powered tennis and pickleball swing analysis platform.
> It uses computer vision and biomechanics AI to analyse video of a player's swing
> and deliver personalized, coach-level feedback instantly.

## Product Overview

SmartSwing AI provides:
- Real-time AI swing analysis for tennis and pickleball players
- Biomechanics breakdown: forehand, backhand, serve, volley, dink
- Personalized drills generated by AI based on each player's weaknesses
- Progress tracking over time with shot benchmarks and trend graphs
- AI coach chat for technique questions, match strategy, and training plans
- Comparison to professional player benchmarks (ATP / WTA / PPA / APP)

## Who It Is For

- **Tennis players** (recreational to competitive, NTRP 2.5–6.0)
- **Pickleball players** (beginner to PPA/APP competitive)
- **Tennis & pickleball coaches** — analyse multiple students, assign drills
- **Tennis clubs & academies** — group programmes, court analytics
- **Parents of junior players** — track their child's development

## Technology

- AI model: Claude (Anthropic) for coaching language and personalized feedback
- Computer vision: video upload and frame-by-frame biomechanics analysis
- Platforms: iOS app, Android app, web dashboard
- Auth & data: Supabase
- Payments: Stripe

## Company

- Name: SmartSwing AI
- Website: https://www.smartswingai.com
- Founded: 2025
- Category: Sports technology / AI coaching / Tennis technology
- Comparable to: SwingVision, PlaySight, Hudl, CoachNow — but AI-first and pickleball-inclusive

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is SmartSwing AI?**
SmartSwing AI is an artificial intelligence platform that analyses tennis and pickleball swing videos using computer vision and biomechanics models, then generates personalised coaching feedback, drills, and progress tracking — without needing a human coach present.

**How does SmartSwing AI analyse my swing?**
You record a short video of your swing on your phone. SmartSwing AI processes each frame, identifies key body positions and racket path, compares them to optimal biomechanics benchmarks, and produces a detailed report with strengths, weaknesses, and drill recommendations.

**Does SmartSwing AI work for pickleball?**
Yes. SmartSwing AI supports pickleball analysis including dinks, drives, serves, drops, and volleys. It uses PPA/APP player benchmarks for comparison.

**Is SmartSwing AI a replacement for a human coach?**
No — SmartSwing AI is a tool that augments coaching. It handles video analysis and data, freeing coaches to focus on motivation and strategy. Clubs and academies use it alongside their coaches.

**What are the pricing plans?**
SmartSwing AI offers tiered subscriptions for individual players, coaches, and clubs. See https://www.smartswingai.com/pricing.html for current plans.

**How does SmartSwing AI compare to SwingVision?**
SwingVision focuses on ball tracking and match stats for iPhone. SmartSwing AI focuses on biomechanics coaching feedback, supports pickleball, and is platform-agnostic.
